name: email_validate
description: Validate an email address — syntax, MX records, disposable/role detection, and typo suggestions. Keyless trial of the Email Validator API.

name: currency_convert
description: Convert an amount between currencies using European Central Bank daily reference rates. Keyless trial of the Currency Exchange Rates API.

name: url_metadata
description: Fetch a URL's Open Graph / Twitter card metadata (title, description, preview image) server-side. Keyless trial of the Web Toolbox API.

name: cors_fetch
description: Fetch any URL through the SSRF-hardened CORS proxy and return its response headers + status. Keyless trial of the CORS Proxy & Web Toolbox API.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_apis, url_metadata, cors_fetch · Private data: email_validate · Public sink: email_validate.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_apis, url_metadata, cors_fetch · Private data: email_validate · Public sink: email_validate

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
